description_long: This is a standard traffic cone with a conical shape and a wide, square base for stability. The cone is predominantly orange with two broad, horizontal white reflective stripes encircling its midsection and upper portion. The surface appears smooth and slightly glossy, typical of flexible plastic or rubber used for high-visibility road safety equipment. The tip of the cone is flat and solid, with no attachments or openings. The base is thick, flat, and extends outward to prevent tipping, likely weighted or reinforced for added stability. There are no visible logos, text, or markings, and the cone appears to be in new, clean condition with no signs of wear or damage.
description: A bright orange traffic cone with two wide white reflective stripes and a sturdy square base, appearing new and clean.
description_view_0: Front view showing the orange cone with two white stripes and a flat, square base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the same orange and white color pattern and the broad, stable base.
description_view_2: Another angle of the cone, emphasizing the smooth surface and the symmetry of the stripes.
description_view_3: Rear view, similar to the front, with clear visibility of the cone's tip and base.
attribute_reflective_stripes: Two wide, horizontal white reflective stripes encircle the cone, one near the top and one at mid-height.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is flat, solid, and orange, with no attachments or openings.
attribute_base_design: The base is square, flat, and thick, extending outward for stability, likely made of heavier rubber or plastic.
attribute_presence_of_logos_or_markings: No logos, text, or other markings are visible.
